Add a label column to the data frame subset for the volcano plot

Source: R/utils_maxquant.R
add_label_column.Rd

Add a label column to the data frame subset for the volcano plot

Usage

add_label_column(df_subset, label_points)

Arguments

df_subset

the data frame to be used for the volcano plot, which should contain the columns "Gene.names", "Protein.names", and "Protein.IDs" and a column "vp_colorcode" which contains the colour code for each point in the volcano plot (0, 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5)

label_points

character string specifying which points to label in the volcano plot. This can be one of the following: "none", "all", a character vector of selected proteins to label, a code for auto-labelling

Value

the input data frame with an additional column "point_labels" containing the labels for the points to be labelled in the volcano plot. The "point_labels"
